ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2011 Continued To Aug-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Colleen McAvoy and the Executor Mary Elizabeth Bhatnagar to appear on August 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear at today's hearing on the Petition for Final Distribution and why they failed to file an amendment to the petition or an amended petition. The matter was continued to August 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
